sentences.sentence: We are all explorers.
sentences.translation: 我们都是探索者。
difficult_points: all 修饰 explorers，强调探索并不只属于少数专业人士。
explorers 在此既可指实际探险者，也为后文更广义的探索概念铺垫。

sentences.sentence: Our desire to discover, and then share that newly found knowledge, is part of what makes us human – indeed, this has played an important part in our success as a species.
sentences.translation: 我们发现事物、并随后分享新获得知识的欲望，是造就我们人性的一部分；事实上，这在人类作为一个物种取得成功的过程中发挥了重要作用。

structure.text: Our desire to discover, and then share that newly found knowledge
to discover, and then share that newly found knowledge
is part of what makes us human
indeed, this has played an important part in our success as a species

difficult_points: 主语是 Our desire，两个不定式 discover 与 share 说明这种欲望的内容。
what makes us human 是宾语从句，表示“使我们成为人类的东西”。
破折号后的 indeed 引出进一步强调。
this 指代前面“发现并分享知识的欲望”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 使我们成为人类的特质

sentences.sentence: Long before the first caveman slumped down beside the fire and grunted news that there were plenty of wildebeest over yonder, our ancestors had learnt the value of sending out scouts to investigate the unknown.
sentences.translation: 早在第一个穴居人在火堆旁瘫坐下来、咕哝着远处有许多角马的消息之前，我们的祖先就已经懂得派出侦察者去调查未知事物的价值。

structure.text: Long before the first caveman slumped down beside the fire and grunted news that there were plenty of wildebeest over yonder
that there were plenty of wildebeest over yonder
the value of sending out scouts to investigate the unknown

difficult_points: Long before 引导时间状语，突出这种探索价值很早就存在。
that there were... 是 news 的同位语从句，说明消息内容。
had learnt 使用过去完成时，表示在穴居人传递消息之前祖先已学会。
to investigate the unknown 是目的不定式，说明派出 scouts 的目的。

sentences.sentence: This questing nature of ours undoubtedly helped our species spread around the globe, just as it nowadays no doubt helps the last nomadic Penan maintain their existence in the depleted forests of Borneo, and a visitor negotiate the subways of New York.
sentences.translation: 我们这种探索的天性无疑帮助人类这个物种传播到世界各地，正如今天它无疑也帮助最后的游牧 Penan 人在婆罗洲日渐枯竭的森林中维持生存，并帮助游客应对纽约的地铁系统。

structure.text: our species spread around the globe
just as it nowadays no doubt helps the last nomadic Penan maintain their existence in the depleted forests of Borneo, and a visitor negotiate the subways of New York
maintain their existence in the depleted forests of Borneo

difficult_points: This questing nature of ours 回指人类发现和探索的欲望。
helped our species spread 是 help + 宾语 + 动词原形结构。
just as 引导类比状语从句，把远古扩散与现代生活相联系。
helps 后并列两个宾语补足结构：Penan maintain... 与 visitor negotiate...。

sentences.sentence: Over the years, we've come to think of explorers as a peculiar breed – different from the rest of us, different from those of us who are merely 'well travelled', even; and perhaps there is a type of person more suited to seeking out the new, a type of caveman more inclined to risk venturing out.
sentences.translation: 多年来，我们逐渐把探索者看成一个特殊群体——不同于我们其他人，甚至不同于那些只是“旅行经验丰富”的人；也许确实有一种人更适合寻找新事物，有一种穴居人更倾向于冒险外出。

structure.text: we've come to think of explorers as a peculiar breed
different from the rest of us, different from those of us who are merely 'well travelled', even
and perhaps there is a type of person more suited to seeking out the new
a type of caveman more inclined to risk venturing out

difficult_points: come to think of A as B 表示逐渐形成“把 A 看作 B”的看法。
破折号后的两个 different from 短语补充说明 peculiar breed。
who are merely 'well travelled' 修饰 those of us。
分号后的 and perhaps 引出作者承认某些人可能更适合探索。

sentences.sentence: That, however, doesn't take away from the fact that we all have this enquiring instinct, even today; and that in all sorts of professions – whether artist, marine biologist or astronomer – borders of the unknown are being tested each day.
sentences.translation: 然而，这并不削弱这样一个事实：即使在今天，我们所有人都有这种探究本能；而且在各种职业中——无论是艺术家、海洋生物学家还是天文学家——未知的边界每天都在被试探。

structure.text: That, however, doesn't take away from the fact
that we all have this enquiring instinct, even today
and that in all sorts of professions – whether artist, marine biologist or astronomer – borders of the unknown are being tested each day
whether artist, marine biologist or astronomer
borders of the unknown are being tested each day

difficult_points: That 指代上一句中“有些人更适合探索”的可能性。
take away from the fact 表示削弱或否定某一事实。
两个 that 从句并列，分别说明人皆有探究本能和未知边界每天被试探。
are being tested 是现在进行时被动语态，强调正在持续发生。

expressions.text: take away from the fact that

sentences.sentence: Thomas Hardy set some of his novels in Egdon Heath, a fictional area of uncultivated land, and used the landscape to suggest the desires and fears of his characters.
sentences.translation: Thomas Hardy 将自己的一些小说设定在 Egdon Heath 这个虚构的未开垦地区，并用这片景观暗示人物的欲望与恐惧。

structure.text: set some of his novels in Egdon Heath
a fictional area of uncultivated land
and used the landscape to suggest the desires and fears of his characters

difficult_points: set... in... 表示把小说背景设定在某地。
a fictional area of uncultivated land 是 Egdon Heath 的同位语解释。
and 连接 Hardy 的两个动作：set 与 used。
to suggest... 是目的不定式，说明 landscape 的文学功能。

sentences.sentence: He is delving into matters we all recognise because they are common to humanity.
sentences.translation: 他正在深入探究我们都能识别的问题，因为它们是人类共有的。

structure.text: because they are common to humanity

difficult_points: He 指代 Thomas Hardy。
matters we all recognise 中省略关系词 that，修饰 matters。
because 从句解释这些 matters 为什么能被所有人识别。
common to humanity 表示属于全人类共有经验。

sentences.sentence: This is surely an act of exploration, and into a world as remote as the author chooses.
sentences.translation: 这无疑是一种探索行为，而且是进入一个作者所选择的、同样遥远的世界。

structure.text: and into a world as remote as the author chooses
as remote as the author chooses

difficult_points: This 回指 Hardy 通过文学进入人类共同主题的做法。
surely 强化作者判断：文学创作也属于探索。
and into a world... 省略了类似 goes 的动词含义。
as remote as the author chooses 表示这个世界的遥远程度由作者决定。

sentences.sentence: Explorer and travel writer Peter Fleming talks of the moment when the explorer returns to the existence he has left behind with his loved ones.
sentences.translation: 探险家兼旅行作家 Peter Fleming 谈到探索者回到自己曾与亲人一同离开的那种生活状态的时刻。

structure.text: Explorer and travel writer Peter Fleming
the moment when the explorer returns to the existence he has left behind with his loved ones
when the explorer returns to the existence he has left behind with his loved ones
he has left behind with his loved ones

difficult_points: Explorer and travel writer 是 Peter Fleming 的身份说明。
talks of 表示“谈到”，后接 the moment。
when 引导定语从句，修饰 the moment。
he has left behind... 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 existence。

sentences.sentence: The traveller 'who has for weeks or months seen himself only as a puny and irrelevant alien crawling laboriously over a country in which he has no roots and no background, suddenly encounters his other self, a relatively solid figure, with a place in the minds of certain people'.
sentences.translation: 这个旅行者“数周或数月来只把自己看作一个渺小而无关紧要的异乡人，在一个自己没有根基、也没有背景的国家里艰难爬行；他突然遇见了自己的另一个自我，一个相对实在、在某些人心中占有位置的形象”。

structure.text: 'who has for weeks or months seen himself only as a puny and irrelevant alien crawling laboriously over a country in which he has no roots and no background
in which he has no roots and no background
his other self, a relatively solid figure, with a place in the minds of certain people

difficult_points: 引号中的 who 从句很长，修饰 The traveller，主句谓语是 suddenly encounters。
seen himself only as... 使用 see A as B 结构，说明旅行者此前的自我认知。
crawling laboriously... 是现在分词短语，修饰 alien。
a relatively solid figure 是 his other self 的同位语说明。

sentences.sentence: In this book about the exploration of the earth's surface, I have confined myself to those whose travels were real and who also aimed at more than personal discovery.
sentences.translation: 在这本关于探索地球表面的书中，我把范围限定在那些旅行真实发生、且目标不只是个人发现的人身上。

structure.text: In this book about the exploration of the earth's surface
to those whose travels were real and who also aimed at more than personal discovery
whose travels were real and who also aimed at more than personal discovery

difficult_points: In this book... 限定作者讨论的语境。
confined myself to 表示主动限制讨论范围。
those 指那些探索者，后面由两个并列定语从句限定。
more than personal discovery 表示目标超越个人层面的发现。

sentences.sentence: But that still left me with another problem: the word 'explorer' has become associated with a past era.
sentences.translation: 但这仍给我留下了另一个问题：“探索者”这个词已经与过去的时代联系在一起。

structure.text: But that still left me with another problem

difficult_points: that 指代上一句作者限定研究对象的做法。
left me with another problem 表示“给我留下另一个问题”。
冒号后解释 another problem 的具体内容。
has become associated with 使用现在完成时，强调这种联想已经形成。

sentences.sentence: We think back to a golden age, as if exploration peaked somehow in the 19th century – as if the process of discovery is now on the decline, though the truth is that we have named only one and a half million of this planet's species, and there may be more than 10 million – and that's not including bacteria.
sentences.translation: 我们回想起一个黄金时代，仿佛探索在 19 世纪以某种方式达到了顶峰——仿佛发现的过程如今正在衰退；然而事实是，我们只命名了地球上一百五十万个物种，而可能还有一千万多个物种——这还不包括细菌。

structure.text: think back to a golden age
as if exploration peaked somehow in the 19th century
as if the process of discovery is now on the decline
though the truth is that we have named only one and a half million of this planet's species, and there may be more than 10 million

difficult_points: 两个 as if 从句说明人们误以为探索已在过去达到顶峰并走向衰退。
though 引导让步从句，转向现实事实。
that we have named... 是表语从句，说明 truth 的内容。
that's not including bacteria 进一步补充数量还被低估。

sentences.sentence: We have studied only 5 per cent of the species we know.
sentences.translation: 我们只研究过已知物种中的 5%。

structure.text: only 5 per cent of the species we know

difficult_points: have studied 使用现在完成时，强调截至目前研究过的范围。
only 强调研究比例很小。
we know 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 species。

sentences.sentence: We have scarcely mapped the ocean floors, and know even less about ourselves; we fully understand the workings of only 10 per cent of our brains.
sentences.translation: 我们几乎还没有绘制海底地图，对自身的了解更少；我们只完全理解大脑 10% 的运作。

structure.text: have scarcely mapped the ocean floors
and know even less about ourselves
the workings of only 10 per cent of our brains

difficult_points: scarcely 表示“几乎不”，强调海底仍未充分绘制。
and know even less about ourselves 与前半句并列，进一步强调未知之多。
分号连接两个紧密相关的独立分句。
the workings of... 指内部运作机制。

sentences.sentence: Here is how some of today's 'explorers' define the word.
sentences.translation: 以下是当今一些“探索者”对这个词的定义。

structure.text: how some of today's 'explorers' define the word

difficult_points: Here is 引出下文列举的内容。
how 引导名词性从句，表示“如何定义”。
the word 指上一段讨论的 explorer 或 exploration。

sentences.sentence: Ran Fiennes, dubbed the 'greatest living explorer', said, 'An explorer is someone who has done something that no human has done before – and also done something scientifically useful.'
sentences.translation: 被称为“在世最伟大的探险家”的 Ran Fiennes 说：“探索者是做过前人未做之事的人，而且还做了具有科学价值的事情。”

structure.text: 'An explorer is someone who has done something that no human has done before – and also done something scientifically useful.'
who has done something that no human has done before

difficult_points: dubbed... 是过去分词短语，补充 Ran Fiennes 的称号。
direct speech 中 someone 后接 who 定语从句，定义 explorer。
that no human has done before 修饰 something。
and also done something scientifically useful 与前面的 has done something 并列。

expressions.text: has done something that no human has done before

sentences.sentence: Chris Bonington, a leading mountaineer, felt exploration was to be found in the act of physically touching the unknown: 'You have to have gone somewhere new.'
sentences.translation: 著名登山家 Chris Bonington 认为，探索存在于身体上触碰未知的行为之中：“你必须去过某个新的地方。”

structure.text: exploration was to be found in the act of physically touching the unknown
'You have to have gone somewhere new.'

difficult_points: a leading mountaineer 是 Chris Bonington 的同位语。
felt 后省略 that，引出他的观点。
was to be found in 表示“存在于……之中”。
have to have gone 使用完成式，强调必须已经亲自去过新地方。

sentences.sentence: Then Robin Hanbury-Tenison, a campaigner on behalf of remote so-called 'tribal' peoples, said, 'A traveller simply records information about some far-off world, and reports back; but an explorer changes the world.'
sentences.translation: 随后，代表偏远地区所谓“部落”民族发声的活动家 Robin Hanbury-Tenison 说：“旅行者只是记录某个遥远世界的信息并带回报告；但探索者会改变世界。”

structure.text: a campaigner on behalf of remote so-called 'tribal' peoples
'A traveller simply records information about some far-off world, and reports back; but an explorer changes the world.'
but an explorer changes the world

difficult_points: a campaigner... 是 Robin Hanbury-Tenison 的身份说明。
on behalf of 表示他代表或支持这些群体。
引语中 traveller 与 explorer 形成对比。
分号加 but 强化“记录信息”与“改变世界”的差别。

sentences.sentence: Wilfred Thesiger, who crossed Arabia's Empty Quarter in 1946, and belongs to an era of unmechanised travel now lost to the rest of us, told me, 'If I'd gone across by camel when I could have gone by car, it would have been a stunt.'
sentences.translation: Wilfred Thesiger 于 1946 年穿越了阿拉伯的鲁卜哈利沙漠，属于一个如今我们其他人已失去的非机械化旅行时代；他告诉我：“如果我本可以坐车却骑骆驼穿越，那就只是作秀。”

structure.text: who crossed Arabia's Empty Quarter in 1946, and belongs to an era of unmechanised travel now lost to the rest of us
now lost to the rest of us
'If I'd gone across by camel when I could have gone by car, it would have been a stunt.'

difficult_points: who 引导非限制性定语从句，补充 Thesiger 的经历和时代归属。
now lost to the rest of us 修饰 era，表示这种旅行时代已经不属于我们。
If I'd gone... it would have been... 是对过去情况的虚拟条件句。
when I could have gone by car 表示如果有更现代交通方式可选。

sentences.sentence: To him, exploration meant bringing back information from a remote place regardless of any great self-discovery.
sentences.translation: 对他而言，探索意味着从偏远之地带回信息，而不在乎是否有重大的自我发现。

structure.text: bringing back information from a remote place

difficult_points: To him 表示从 Thesiger 的角度看。
meant 后接动名词短语 bringing back... 说明 exploration 的含义。
regardless of 表示不受某因素影响。
self-discovery 与上一段 personal discovery 呼应。

sentences.sentence: Each definition is slightly different – and tends to reflect the field of endeavour of each pioneer.
sentences.translation: 每一种定义都略有不同，并且往往反映出每位先驱者各自的努力领域。

structure.text: and tends to reflect the field of endeavour of each pioneer
the field of endeavour of each pioneer

difficult_points: Each definition 总结上一段不同探索者给出的定义。
tends to reflect 表示通常会反映出某种背景。
field of endeavour 指每位探索者从事或努力的领域。

sentences.sentence: It was the same whoever I asked: the prominent historian would say exploration was a thing of the past, the cutting-edge scientist would say it was of the present.
sentences.translation: 无论我问谁，情况都是一样的：著名历史学家会说探索是过去之事，而前沿科学家会说它属于当下。

structure.text: It was the same whoever I asked
the prominent historian would say exploration was a thing of the past
the cutting-edge scientist would say it was of the present

difficult_points: whoever I asked 表示无论询问哪类人。
冒号后具体解释 It was the same 的含义。
would say 表示一种典型或习惯性回答。
it was of the present 中 it 指代 exploration。

sentences.sentence: And so on.
sentences.translation: 诸如此类。
difficult_points: And so on 是省略表达，表示还有更多类似例子。
该句承接上一句不同职业会给出不同定义的列举。

sentences.sentence: They each set their own particular criteria; the common factor in their approach being that they all had, unlike many of us who simply enjoy travel or discovering new things, both a very definite objective from the outset and also a desire to record their findings.
sentences.translation: 他们各自设定自己的特定标准；他们方法中的共同因素是，与我们许多只是享受旅行或发现新事物的人不同，他们从一开始就既有非常明确的目标，也有记录发现的愿望。

structure.text: They each set their own particular criteria

the common factor in their approach being that they all had, unlike many of us who simply enjoy travel or discovering new things, both a very definite objective from the outset and also a desire to record their findings
who simply enjoy travel or discovering new things
both a very definite objective from the outset and also a desire to record their findings

difficult_points: 分号后不是完整谓语句，而是 the common factor... being 的独立主格结构。
unlike many of us... 是插入对比，突出探索者与普通旅行者不同。
both... and also... 连接两个共同特征：明确目标与记录发现的愿望。
to record their findings 是不定式，修饰 desire。

sentences.sentence: I'd best declare my own bias.
sentences.translation: 我最好先说明我自己的偏向。
difficult_points: I'd best 是 I had best 的缩写，表示“我最好”。
declare my own bias 表示作者主动说明自己的立场倾向。

sentences.sentence: As a writer, I'm interested in the exploration of ideas.
sentences.translation: 作为作家，我感兴趣的是思想的探索。
difficult_points: As a writer 限定作者偏向的身份来源。
be interested in 后接名词短语。
the exploration of ideas 把探索从地理行动扩展到思想层面。

sentences.sentence: I've done a great many expeditions and each one was unique.
sentences.translation: 我参加过很多次探险，每一次都是独特的。

structure.text: I've done a great many expeditions

difficult_points: I've done 使用现在完成时，概括作者至今的经历。
a great many 表示数量很多。
each one 指每一次 expedition。

sentences.sentence: I've lived for months alone with isolated groups of people all around the world, even two 'uncontacted tribes'.
sentences.translation: 我曾在世界各地与一些与世隔绝的人群单独共同生活数月，甚至包括两个“未接触部落”。

structure.text: alone with isolated groups of people all around the world

difficult_points: for months 表示持续时间。
alone with... 看似矛盾，实际表示作者独自一人与这些群体共同生活。
all around the world 修饰 isolated groups of people 的分布范围。
even two 'uncontacted tribes' 是补充例子，突出经历特殊。

sentences.sentence: But none of these things is of the slightest interest to anyone unless, through my books, I've found a new slant, explored a new idea.
sentences.translation: 但除非我通过自己的书找到了新的角度、探索了新的思想，否则这些事情没有一件会让任何人产生丝毫兴趣。

structure.text: is of the slightest interest to anyone
unless, through my books, I've found a new slant, explored a new idea
I've found a new slant, explored a new idea

difficult_points: none of these things 作主语，谓语用单数 is。
be of interest to 表示“对……有兴趣或价值”。
unless 引导条件从句，说明这些经历有意义的前提。
found 与 explored 并列，表示作者需要通过书提供新角度和新思想。

expressions.text: be of the slightest interest to

sentences.sentence: Why?
sentences.translation: 为什么？
difficult_points: 这是省略问句，完整含义是询问前一句判断成立的原因。
短问句制造停顿，引出后文解释。

sentences.sentence: Because the world has moved on.
sentences.translation: 因为世界已经向前发展了。
difficult_points: Because 回答上一句 Why，单独成句形成强调。
has moved on 使用现在完成时，表示世界已经发生变化并影响现在。
move on 在此表示继续发展、进入新阶段。

sentences.sentence: The time has long passed for the great continental voyages – another walk to the poles, another crossing of the Empty Quarter.
sentences.translation: 伟大的大陆远征时代早已过去——再走一次到极地，再穿越一次鲁卜哈利沙漠，都已不再属于那个时代。

structure.text: another walk to the poles, another crossing of the Empty Quarter

difficult_points: has long passed 表示某个时代早已结束。
for the great continental voyages 说明结束的是哪类探索时代。
破折号后列举典型的大陆远征例子。
another 强调重复这些壮举已不再新鲜。

sentences.sentence: We know how the land surface of our planet lies; exploration of it is now down to the details – the habits of microbes, say, or the grazing behaviour of buffalo.
sentences.translation: 我们已经知道地球陆地表面的分布情况；对它的探索如今已经深入到细节层面——比如微生物的习性，或水牛的放牧行为。

structure.text: how the land surface of our planet lies
exploration of it is now down to the details
the habits of microbes, say, or the grazing behaviour of buffalo

difficult_points: how 引导 know 的宾语从句，表示陆地表面如何分布。
分号连接两个独立但递进的分句。
it 指代 the land surface of our planet。
破折号后用具体例子解释 details 的含义。

sentences.sentence: Aside from the deep sea and deep underground, it's the era of specialists.
sentences.translation: 除了深海和地下深处之外，如今是专家的时代。

structure.text: Aside from the deep sea and deep underground

difficult_points: Aside from 表示排除例外情况。
it 指当前探索所处的时代。
the era of specialists 表示探索越来越依赖专业领域专家。

sentences.sentence: However, this is to disregard the role the human mind has in conveying remote places; and this is what interests me: how a fresh interpretation, even of a well-travelled route, can give its readers new insights.
sentences.translation: 然而，这样说就忽视了人类心智在传达遥远地点时所发挥的作用；而这正是我感兴趣的：一种新的诠释，即便是对一条广为人走过的路线的诠释，也能如何给予读者新的洞见。

structure.text: this is to disregard the role the human mind has in conveying remote places
the human mind has in conveying remote places
and this is what interests me
how a fresh interpretation, even of a well-travelled route, can give its readers new insights

difficult_points: However 引出对“专家时代”说法的修正。
the role the human mind has... 中省略关系词 that，修饰 role。
what interests me 是表语从句，说明作者真正关心的内容。
冒号后的 how 从句解释 this 的具体内容：新诠释如何带来新洞见。
